load-pdf-page-editor.title: Load PDF with PdfPageEditor for Editing
load-pdf-page-editor.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor, prepare it for editing, and save the result.

edit-pdf-pages-memory.title: Edit PDF Pages from Memory Stream using PdfPageEditor
edit-pdf-pages-memory.description: Loads a PDF from a memory stream, uses PdfPageEditor to rotate and delete pages, and saves the result.

edit-pdf-pages-save.title: Edit PDF Pages and Save with PdfPageEditor
edit-pdf-pages-save.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, apply page transformations such as rotation and zoom using PdfPageEditor, and save the result to a new file.

save-pdf-to-memorystream.title: Save Modified PDF to MemoryStream
save-pdf-to-memorystream.description: Loads a PDF, adds a text annotation, and saves the modified document into a MemoryStream for further processing without writing to disk.

rotate-pdf-page.title: Rotate Specific PDF Page Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to rotate the second page of a PDF by 90 degrees using the PdfPageEditor PageRotations dictionary.

rotate-specific-pages.title: Rotate Specific PDF Pages by 180 Degrees
rotate-specific-pages.description: Demonstrates rotating pages 3, 5, and 7 of a PDF by 180 degrees using multiple PageRotation entries.

rotate-page-four-pdfpageeditor.title: Rotate Specific PDF Page Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-page-four-pdfpageeditor.description: Demonstrates how to rotate page four of a PDF to 180 degrees using the PdfPageEditor class.

get-page-size.title: Get Size of a Specific PDF Page
get-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve the width and height of page two in a PDF using PdfPageEditor.

get-page-rotation.title: Get Page Rotation Using PdfPageEditor
get-page-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve the rotation angle of a specific PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

resize-page-six-letter.title: Resize Specific PDF Page to Letter Size using PdfPageEditor
resize-page-six-letter.description: Demonstrates how to change the size of page six of a PDF to Letter dimensions using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

set-page-zoom.title: Set Zoom of Specific PDF Page
set-page-zoom.description: Demonstrates how to change the zoom level of page three to 150% using PdfPageEditor.

apply-zoom-even-pages.title: Apply Zoom to Even-Numbered PDF Pages
apply-zoom-even-pages.description: Demonstrates how to set a 1.2 zoom level on all even-numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-page-transition-fade.title: Set Page Transition Effect (Fade) for PDF Slide Show
set-page-transition-fade.description: Demonstrates how to apply a fade (dissolve) transition and a two‑second duration to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-dissolve-transition.title: Apply Dissolve Transition to PDF Page
apply-dissolve-transition.description: Demonstrates how to set a dissolve page transition with a three‑second duration on page five of a PDF.

set-page-duration.title: Set Slide Show Duration for a PDF Page
set-page-duration.description: Demonstrates how to set the display duration of page five to five seconds in a PDF slide show.

align-page-two-left.title: Align Page Two Content Left in PDF
align-page-two-left.description: Demonstrates how to left‑justify the content of the second page of a PDF using PdfPageEditor.

align-page-vertical-top.title: Align Page Content Vertically to Top
align-page-vertical-top.description: Demonstrates aligning the content of the third page of a PDF to the top using PdfPageEditor.VerticalAlignmentType.

resize-pdf-contents-margins.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with 10% Margins
resize-pdf-contents-margins.description: Demonstrates how to shrink the contents of all pages by adding a 10 % margin around each page using PdfFileEditor.ResizeContents.

resize-specific-pages-margins.title: Resize Specific PDF Pages with Custom Margins
resize-specific-pages-margins.description: Demonstrates how to shrink the contents of pages 2 and 4 of a PDF and add custom left and right margins using PdfFileEditor and ContentsResizeParameters.

rotate-first-page-batch.title: Rotate First Page of PDFs in a Folder
rotate-first-page-batch.description: Demonstrates how to batch process a folder of PDF files, rotating the first page of each document by 90 degrees.

batch-convert-pdfs-a4.title: Batch Convert PDFs to A4 Page Size
batch-convert-pdfs-a4.description: Converts multiple PDF files to A4 page size for uniform printing across all documents.

rotate-resize-page-three.title: Rotate and Resize Page Three to Letter Size
rotate-resize-page-three.description: Demonstrates rotating page 3 by 90 degrees and changing its size to Letter in a PDF.

apply-image-stamp-zoom.title: Apply Image Stamp to Selected Non-Consecutive Pages with Zoom
apply-image-stamp-zoom.description: Demonstrates how to stamp an image on specific non-consecutive PDF pages and set a common zoom factor using Aspose.Pdf.

set-transition-duration-range.title: Set Transition Duration for a Range of PDF Pages
set-transition-duration-range.description: Demonstrates how to set a one-second transition duration for a specific range of pages in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-pdf-pages.title: Rotate PDF Pages with Validation
rotate-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to validate rotation values (0, 90, 180, 270) before applying them to a PDF using PdfPageEditor.

handle-invalid-page-rotation.title: Handle Invalid Page Rotation Safely
handle-invalid-page-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to catch and handle an invalid rotation value when rotating a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-contents-resize-parameters.title: Create ContentsResizeParameters with Uniform Margins
create-contents-resize-parameters.description: Demonstrates how to create a ContentsResizeParameters object with 5‑point margins on all sides using Aspose.Pdf.

create-contents-resize-parameters__v2.title: Create ContentsResizeParameters with 15% Margins
create-contents-resize-parameters__v2.description: Demonstrates how to create a ContentsResizeParameters object with uniform 15% margins using the PdfFileEditor API.

apply-different-zoom-levels.title: Apply Different Zoom Levels to PDF Pages
apply-different-zoom-levels.description: Demonstrates how to set a distinct zoom factor for each page of a PDF using PdfPageEditor.

set-fade-transition.title: Set Fade Transition for All PDF Pages
set-fade-transition.description: Demonstrates how to apply the same fade (dissolve) transition to every page of a PDF using PdfPageEditor.

assign-page-transitions.title: Assign Page Transition Effects Based on Content Type
assign-page-transitions.description: Demonstrates how to set different transition effects for individual PDF pages using PdfPageEditor.

set-page-duration-by-word-count.title: Set Page Display Duration Based on Word Count
set-page-duration-by-word-count.description: Demonstrates how to calculate the word count of each PDF page and set its display duration proportionally to control reading time.

edit-pdf-memory.title: Edit PDF in Memory with PdfPageEditor
edit-pdf-memory.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a MemoryStream, applying page rotation and zoom using PdfPageEditor, and saving the result back to a MemoryStream.

chain-page-modifications.title: Chain Page Rotation, Size, and Zoom Modifications
chain-page-modifications.description: Demonstrates how to rotate pages, change page size, and apply zoom using PdfPageEditor before saving the PDF.

reset-page-rotation.title: Reset Page Rotation to Zero
reset-page-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to reset the rotation of page six to zero degrees using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

revert-page-size.title: Revert Page Size of Specific Page in PDF
revert-page-size.description: Shows how to store a PDF page's original dimensions, modify its size, and then restore the original size.

log-page-dimensions-rotation.title: Log PDF Page Dimensions and Rotation Before and After Editing
log-page-dimensions-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to record page size and rotation values of a PDF before and after applying edits using PdfPageEditor, writing the audit information to a text file.

get-pdf-page-size-safe.title: Get PDF Page Size with Safe Error Handling
get-pdf-page-size-safe.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve the size of a specific PDF page using PdfPageEditor and handle non‑existent page numbers with try‑catch.

apply-left-horizontal-alignment.title: Apply Left Horizontal Alignment to All PDF Pages
apply-left-horizontal-alignment.description: Demonstrates how to set a uniform left‑justified horizontal alignment for all pages of a PDF using PdfPageEditor.

apply-vertical-alignment.title: Apply Top Vertical Alignment to Selected PDF Pages
apply-vertical-alignment.description: Demonstrates how to set the vertical alignment of specific pages in a PDF to the top using PdfPageEditor.

set-page-transition.title: Set Page Transition to Outward Box with Duration
set-page-transition.description: Demonstrates how to apply an outward box (zoom‑out) transition with a three‑second duration to page two of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-page-transition-cover.title: Set Page Transition to Cover with Duration
set-page-transition-cover.description: Demonstrates how to apply a Cover transition with a one‑second duration to page four of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-page-zoom__v2.title: Set Zoom of Specific PDF Page
set-page-zoom__v2.description: Demonstrates how to set the zoom level of page five to 75% using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

set-page-zoom-double.title: Set Zoom of Specific PDF Page to Double Magnification
set-page-zoom-double.description: Demonstrates how to set the zoom factor of page 7 to 2.0 (200% magnification) using PdfPageEditor.

resize-pdf-contents-5-percent.title: Resize PDF Page Contents by 5% Using PdfFileEditor
resize-pdf-contents-5-percent.description: Demonstrates how to shrink the contents of all pages in a PDF by 5% using PdfFileEditor.ResizeContentsPct.

resize-pdf-contents-margin.title: Resize PDF Contents with 20% Margin
resize-pdf-contents-margin.description: Demonstrates how to shrink page contents to 60% of their original size, adding a 20% white margin around each page using PdfFileEditor.

convert-to-landscape-a4.title: Convert PDF Pages to Landscape A4 Orientation
convert-to-landscape-a4.description: Loads a PDF, changes each page to A4 landscape orientation, and saves the result.

convert-portrait-to-landscape.title: Convert Portrait PDF Page to Landscape Orientation
convert-portrait-to-landscape.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF page from portrait to landscape by swapping its dimensions and verifies the new size.

rotate-page-with-transition.title: Rotate PDF Page with Existing Transition Effect
rotate-page-with-transition.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a PDF page by 180 degrees while preserving its transition effect using PdfPageEditor.

resize-and-rotate-page.title: Resize Page Contents and Rotate Page by 90 Degrees
resize-and-rotate-page.description: Demonstrates how to shrink page contents with margins and then rotate a PDF page 90 degrees using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

save-pdf-incremental-update.title: Save PDF with Incremental Update
save-pdf-incremental-update.description: Demonstrates how to modify a PDF and save it using incremental update mode to preserve the original file structure.

save-edited-pdf-backup.title: Save Edited PDF as New File While Preserving Original
save-edited-pdf-backup.description: Loads a PDF, makes a simple modification, and saves it to a new file, leaving the original document untouched.

set-page-display-duration.title: Set Page Display Duration for PDF Slideshow
set-page-display-duration.description: Demonstrates how to set the display duration for each page in a PDF so that it acts as a timed slideshow.

set-page-transition-split.title: Set Page Transition to Split Effect
set-page-transition-split.description: Demonstrates how to apply a split transition and a two‑second duration to page three of a PDF using PdfPageEditor.

disable-page-transition.title: Disable Page Transition Animation for Specific Page
disable-page-transition.description: Demonstrates how to set the transition duration to zero for page six, effectively disabling the transition animation.

apply-sequential-page-transitions.title: Apply Sequential Page Transitions in PDF
apply-sequential-page-transitions.description: Demonstrates how to set different transition effects for each page of a PDF using PdfPageEditor.

set-default-zoom.title: Set Default Zoom for All PDF Pages
set-default-zoom.description: Demonstrates how to set the zoom coefficient to 1.0 (100 %) for every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

set-zoom-odd-pages.title: Set Zoom for Odd Pages in PDF
set-zoom-odd-pages.description: Demonstrates how to increase the zoom level to 1.2 for all odd‑numbered pages of a PDF using PdfPageEditor.

resize-even-pages-zoom.title: Resize Even Pages to 80% Zoom
resize-even-pages-zoom.description: Demonstrates how to shrink the contents of even‑numbered pages to 80% using PdfFileEditor.ResizeContentsPct.

set-page-size-letter.title: Set Page Size to Letter for Specific Pages
set-page-size-letter.description: Demonstrates how to change the size of pages 3 through 6 in a PDF to US Letter dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

set-last-page-a5.title: Set Last Page Size to A5 in PDF
set-last-page-a5.description: Demonstrates how to change the size of the last page of a PDF to A5, useful for creating a compact booklet format.

rotate-every-third-page.title: Rotate Every Third Page to Landscape Orientation
rotate-every-third-page.description: Demonstrates how to rotate every third page of a PDF by 270 degrees using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

retrieve-page-size-after-rotation.title: Retrieve Page Size After Rotation
retrieve-page-size-after-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a PDF page and obtain its dimensions reflecting the new orientation.

retrieve-page-rotation-after-size-change.title: Retrieve Page Rotation After Changing Page Size
retrieve-page-rotation-after-size-change.description: Demonstrates how to get a page's rotation, change its size with PdfPageEditor, and verify that the rotation value remains unchanged.

apply-page-transitions.title: Apply Custom Page Transitions Based on Index
apply-page-transitions.description: Demonstrates how to set different transition effects for each PDF page using PdfPageEditor.

set-page-display-duration__v2.title: Set Incremental Page Display Duration in PDF
set-page-display-duration__v2.description: Demonstrates how to set each PDF page's display duration, increasing by one second per page.

center-align-second-page.title: Center Align Text on Second Page
center-align-second-page.description: Demonstrates how to center-align text on the second page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

align-page-vertical-middle.title: Align Page Content Vertically to Middle on Page 3
align-page-vertical-middle.description: Demonstrates how to vertically center the content of the third page of a PDF using PdfPageEditor.

link-annotation-center-zoom-page4.title: Create Link Annotation with Center Alignment and Zoom to Page 4
link-annotation-center-zoom-page4.description: Demonstrates adding a link annotation that jumps to page 4, aligns the link rectangle to the center, and sets a zoom level of 1.2 for enhanced readability.

batch-resize-pdf-contents.title: Batch Resize PDF Contents with 10% Margins
batch-resize-pdf-contents.description: Demonstrates how to shrink the contents of all pages in a PDF by adding a 10 % margin using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

set-fade-transition__v2.title: Set Fade Transition for All Pages in a PDF Slideshow
set-fade-transition__v2.description: Demonstrates how to apply a fade (dissolve) transition with a two‑second duration to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

resize-pdf-pages.title: Resize PDF Pages from Byte Array
resize-pdf-pages.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, changes the page size using PdfPageEditor, and saves the result to a new file.

dispose-pdfpageeditor.title: Dispose PdfPageEditor After Editing PDF
dispose-pdfpageeditor.description: Demonstrates editing a PDF with PdfPageEditor and properly disposing it to release file handles.

set-custom-page-size.title: Set Custom Page Size Using PdfPageEditor
set-custom-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF to a non‑standard page size using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-page-rotation.title: Set Page Rotation in PDF
set-page-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a PDF page by setting the Rotate property to 0, 90, 180, or 270 degrees.

set-page-transitions.title: Set Page Transition Effects (Fade, Box Out, Cover) in PDF
set-page-transitions.description: Demonstrates how to apply different transition effects (fade, box out, cover) to individual pages of a PDF using PdfPageEditor.

apply-double-zoom-stamp.title: Apply Double-Precision Zoom to a Stamp in PDF
apply-double-zoom-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to set a double‑precision zoom factor on a stamp and apply it to a PDF page.

set-slide-display-duration.title: Set Slide Display Duration in PDF Presentation
set-slide-display-duration.description: Demonstrates how to set an integer display duration (in seconds) for each slide of a PDF presentation using Aspose.Pdf.

set-text-alignment.title: Set Text Alignment in PDF Using HorizontalAlignment
set-text-alignment.description: Demonstrates how to set left, center, or right alignment for a text fragment in a PDF page using the HorizontalAlignment enumeration.

resize-pdf-contents-margins__v2.title: Resize PDF Contents with Uniform Margins
resize-pdf-contents-margins__v2.description: Demonstrates how to add equal margins on all sides of each page by resizing the page contents using PdfFileEditor and ContentsResizeParameters.

resize-pdf-contents-asymmetric-margins.title: Resize PDF Contents with Asymmetric Margins
resize-pdf-contents-asymmetric-margins.description: Demonstrates how to resize PDF page contents by specifying different left and right margins using PdfFileEditor and ContentsResizeParameters.

resize-pdf-contents-margins__v3.title: Resize PDF Contents with Custom Top and Bottom Margins
resize-pdf-contents-margins__v3.description: Demonstrates how to adjust vertical spacing of a PDF by resizing its contents using different top and bottom margins via ContentsResizeParameters.

rotate-page-reset.title: Rotate PDF Page and Reset Orientation
rotate-page-reset.description: Demonstrates rotating a PDF page and then resetting it to its original orientation.

change-page-size-revert.title: Change PDF Page Size and Revert to Original
change-page-size-revert.description: Demonstrates changing a PDF page to custom dimensions and then restoring the original size to verify undo functionality.

log-page-modifications.title: Log Page Property Modifications in PDF
log-page-modifications.description: Demonstrates enabling notification logging, modifying page properties, and writing the generated notifications to a text file for audit.

report-page-properties.title: Report PDF Page Properties Before and After Edits
report-page-properties.description: Loads a PDF, reports each page's size, rotation, and zoom, applies rotation, zoom, and page size changes using PdfPageEditor, then reports the updated properties and saves the edited PDF.

manipulate-encrypted-pdf-pages.title: Manipulate Encrypted PDF Pages with PdfPageEditor
manipulate-encrypted-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF by supplying the password, use PdfPageEditor to modify pages (delete and rotate), and save the updated document.

modify-signed-pdf-pages.title: Modify Pages in Digitally Signed PDF While Preserving Signatures
modify-signed-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to rotate a page in a digitally signed PDF using PdfPageEditor with PreserveSignature enabled, keeping existing signatures intact.

resize-pdf-preserve-annotations.title: Resize PDF Pages While Preserving Annotations
resize-pdf-preserve-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to change the page size of a PDF by adding margins using PdfFileEditor while keeping all annotations intact.

preserve-form-fields-rotate-pages.title: Preserve Form Fields While Rotating PDF Pages
preserve-form-fields-rotate-pages.description: Rotates all pages of a PDF 90° clockwise while preserving interactive form field data by exporting and re‑importing the fields.

apply-transition-odd-pages.title: Apply Transition Effect to Odd Pages in PDF
apply-transition-odd-pages.description: Demonstrates how to set a page transition effect only on odd‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-even-page-duration.title: Set Display Duration for Even Pages in PDF
set-even-page-duration.description: Demonstrates how to set a specific display duration for even-numbered pages in a PDF, useful for alternating slide intervals.

apply-zoom-to-image-pages.title: Apply Zoom to Pages Containing Images
apply-zoom-to-image-pages.description: Detects pages that contain images and applies a zoom factor only to those pages, leaving other pages unchanged.

resize-contents-on-text-pages.title: Resize Contents Only on Pages Containing Text
resize-contents-on-text-pages.description: Demonstrates how to detect pages that contain text and apply content resizing only to those pages using PdfFileEditor.

combine-rotation-zoom-transition.title: Combine Page Rotation and Zoom with Transition Effects
combine-rotation-zoom-transition.description: Demonstrates using PdfPageEditor to rotate pages, apply zoom, and set a transition effect for presentation PDFs.

set-a4-landscape-page-size.title: Set Custom A4 Landscape Page Size
set-a4-landscape-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to set a PDF page to A4 landscape dimensions using explicit width and height properties.

set-page-size-letter-portrait.title: Set PDF Page Size to Letter Portrait
set-page-size-letter-portrait.description: Creates a PDF with a single page sized to standard Letter portrait dimensions (8.5" x 11") using explicit width and height values.

rotate-pages-landscape.title: Rotate PDF Pages Based on Landscape Metadata Flag
rotate-pages-landscape.description: Loads a PDF, checks a custom metadata property for landscape orientation, and rotates all pages 90 degrees if needed.

set-page-transition-by-title.title: Set Page Transition Based on Document Title Length
set-page-transition-by-title.description: Demonstrates how to adjust the page transition duration and type according to the length of the PDF document title using PdfPageEditor.

adjust-zoom-by-word-count.title: Adjust Page Zoom Based on Word Count
adjust-zoom-by-word-count.description: Demonstrates how to increase the zoom level on PDF pages that contain fewer words, improving readability.

batch-set-page-sizes.title: Batch Process PDFs and Set Individual Page Sizes
batch-set-page-sizes.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder, sets each page size based on the file name (e.g., A4 or Letter), and saves the modified PDFs.

extract-rotate-pages.title: Extract and Rotate Selected Pages to New PDF
extract-rotate-pages.description: Demonstrates extracting specific pages from a PDF, rotating them, and saving the result as a new PDF.

merge-pdfs-consistent-margins.title: Merge PDFs with Consistent Margins
merge-pdfs-consistent-margins.description: Merges two PDF files after aligning their page margins to ensure a uniform layout across the combined document.

split-pdf-chapters-scaling.title: Split PDF into Chapters with Uniform Scaling
split-pdf-chapters-scaling.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into separate chapter files while resizing each page to a uniform scale.

pdf-slideshow-transitions.title: Create PDF Slideshow with Page Transitions and Durations
pdf-slideshow-transitions.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF slideshow by adding pages with different transition effects and display durations.

set-boxout-transition-zoom-page-two.title: Set BoxOut Transition and Zoom on Page Two
set-boxout-transition-zoom-page-two.description: Demonstrates how to apply a BoxOut page transition and a 1.3 zoom factor to the second page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

center-align-page-duration.title: Center Align Page and Set Display Duration
center-align-page-duration.description: Demonstrates how to center‑align a specific PDF page and set its display duration to four seconds using Aspose.Pdf.

add-5-percent-margins.title: Add 5% Margins to All PDF Pages
add-5-percent-margins.description: Demonstrates how to add a uniform 5% margin to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

booklet-margin-resize.title: Create Booklet with 15% Margin Resize
booklet-margin-resize.description: Demonstrates how to increase page margins by 15% and then generate a booklet layout using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-pages-landscape-brochure.title: Rotate PDF Pages to Landscape for Brochure Printing
rotate-pages-landscape-brochure.description: Rotates all pages of a PDF to landscape orientation and adjusts page size to standard A4 landscape for brochure printing.

change-page-size-a3.title: Change PDF Page Size to A3
change-page-size-a3.description: Demonstrates how to resize all pages of a PDF to A3 size, providing a larger canvas for high‑resolution graphics.

set-zoom-levels.title: Set Preview and Final Zoom Levels for PDF
set-zoom-levels.description: Demonstrates how to set a 0.5 zoom for preview using PdfPageEditor and a 1.0 zoom for final output using PdfViewer before saving the PDF.

apply-page-settings-from-json.title: Apply Page Settings from JSON Configuration to PDF
apply-page-settings-from-json.description: Loads a PDF, reads page size and background color settings from a JSON file, and applies them to all pages.

hybrid-margin-resize.title: Hybrid Margin Resize of PDF Contents
hybrid-margin-resize.description: Demonstrates creating a ContentsResizeParameters with mixed percentage and absolute margins and applying it to a PDF using PdfFileEditor.

apply-page-transitions__v2.title: Apply Page Transition Effects Based on Page Index
apply-page-transitions__v2.description: Demonstrates how to set different transition effects for each PDF page using PdfPageEditor, cycling through three transition types.

rotate-resize-zoom-pdf.title: Rotate, Resize, and Zoom PDF Pages
rotate-resize-zoom-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to rotate, change page size, and apply zoom to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.
